scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run lint:tokens && npm run test:event-bus && npm run test:kanban-toolbar && npm run test:observability-model && npm run test:goal-coverage-model && npm run test:agent-session
scripts.test:event-bus: rm -rf /tmp/zf-web-event-bus-test && tsc --module ES2022 --moduleResolution Bundler --target ES2022 --lib DOM,DOM.Iterable,ES2022 --skipLibCheck --strict --outDir /tmp/zf-web-event-bus-test --rootDir . tests/projectEventBus.test.ts tests/projectRequestScope.test.ts tests/latestRequestGate.test.ts tests/queryClient.test.ts tests/pageLoadPolicy.test.ts tests/kanbanAgentHistoryPolicy.test.ts tests/triageProposals.test.ts && printf '{"type":"module"}\n' > /tmp/zf-web-event-bus-test/package.json && node /tmp/zf-web-event-bus-test/tests/projectEventBus.test.js && node /tmp/zf-web-event-bus-test/tests/projectRequestScope.test.js && node /tmp/zf-web-event-bus-test/tests/latestRequestGate.test.js && node /tmp/zf-web-event-bus-test/tests/queryClient.test.js && node /tmp/zf-web-event-bus-test/tests/pageLoadPolicy.test.js && node /tmp/zf-web-event-bus-test/tests/kanbanAgentHistoryPolicy.test.js && node /tmp/zf-web-event-bus-test/tests/triageProposals.test.js
scripts.test:kanban-toolbar: rm -rf /tmp/zf-web-kanban-toolbar-test && tsc --module ES2022 --moduleResolution Bundler --target ES2022 --lib DOM,DOM.Iterable,ES2022 --skipLibCheck --strict --outDir /tmp/zf-web-kanban-toolbar-test --rootDir . tests/taskToolbarSelection.test.ts && printf '{"type":"module"}\n' > /tmp/zf-web-kanban-toolbar-test/package.json && node /tmp/zf-web-kanban-toolbar-test/tests/taskToolbarSelection.test.js
scripts.test:observability-model: rm -rf /tmp/zf-web-observability-model-test && tsc --module ES2022 --moduleResolution Bundler --target ES2022 --lib DOM,DOM.Iterable,ES2022 --skipLibCheck --strict --outDir /tmp/zf-web-observability-model-test --rootDir . tests/observabilityModel.test.ts && printf '{"type":"module"}\n' > /tmp/zf-web-observability-model-test/package.json && node /tmp/zf-web-observability-model-test/tests/observabilityModel.test.js
scripts.test:goal-coverage-model: rm -rf /tmp/zf-web-goal-coverage-model-test && tsc --module ES2022 --moduleResolution Bundler --target ES2022 --lib DOM,DOM.Iterable,ES2022 --skipLibCheck --strict --outDir /tmp/zf-web-goal-coverage-model-test --rootDir . tests/goalCoverageModel.test.ts tests/deliveryWorkModel.test.ts tests/deliveryWorkGraphModel.test.ts && printf '{"type":"module"}\n' > /tmp/zf-web-goal-coverage-model-test/package.json && ln -s "$PWD/node_modules" /tmp/zf-web-goal-coverage-model-test/node_modules && node /tmp/zf-web-goal-coverage-model-test/tests/goalCoverageModel.test.js && node /tmp/zf-web-goal-coverage-model-test/tests/deliveryWorkModel.test.js && node /tmp/zf-web-goal-coverage-model-test/tests/deliveryWorkGraphModel.test.js
scripts.test:agent-session: rm -rf /tmp/zf-web-agent-session-test && tsc --module ES2022 --moduleResolution Bundler --target ES2022 --lib DOM,DOM.Iterable,ES2022 --skipLibCheck --strict --outDir /tmp/zf-web-agent-session-test --rootDir . tests/agentToolOutput.test.ts tests/agentWorkState.test.ts tests/agentToolGrouping.test.ts tests/markdownGuard.test.ts tests/channelProjection.test.ts tests/kanbanSessionEvents.test.ts tests/notices.test.ts tests/liveRunIndicator.test.ts tests/channelLiveStream.test.ts && printf '{"type":"module"}\n' > /tmp/zf-web-agent-session-test/package.json && node /tmp/zf-web-agent-session-test/tests/agentToolOutput.test.js && node /tmp/zf-web-agent-session-test/tests/agentWorkState.test.js && node /tmp/zf-web-agent-session-test/tests/agentToolGrouping.test.js && node /tmp/zf-web-agent-session-test/tests/markdownGuard.test.js && node /tmp/zf-web-agent-session-test/tests/channelProjection.test.js && node /tmp/zf-web-agent-session-test/tests/kanbanSessionEvents.test.js && node /tmp/zf-web-agent-session-test/tests/notices.test.js && node /tmp/zf-web-agent-session-test/tests/liveRunIndicator.test.js && node /tmp/zf-web-agent-session-test/tests/channelLiveStream.test.js
